lines.name: Mightblood Ire

implicitModifiers.text: (40-52)% reduced Enemy Stun Threshold with Melee Weapons
(15-30)% increased Stun Duration with Melee Weapons

explicitModifiers.text: Melee Strike Skills deal Splash Damage to surrounding targets

lines.flavourText:
The liquid within boils and fumes,
ready to erupt at any provocation.

lines.name: The Battle Within

implicitModifiers.text: Gain 3 Rage on Melee Weapon Hit

explicitModifiers.text: Does not inflict Mana Burn over time
Inflicts Mana Burn on you when you Hit an Enemy with a Melee Weapon
(1-6)% increased Rarity of Items found per Mana Burn, up to a maximum of 100%
Melee Weapon Attacks have Culling Strike

lines.flavourText: The struggle for balance never ends.

lines.name: Grasping Nightshade

implicitModifiers.text: (25-32)% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Melee Weapons
(25-45)% increased Effect of Blind from Melee Weapons

explicitModifiers.text: Melee Weapon Hits Inflict (2-3) Withered Debuffs for 2 seconds
(20-37)% chance to inflict a Grasping Vine on Melee Weapon Hit

lines.flavourText: A virulent brew of death and decay.

lines.name: Sap of the Seasons

implicitModifiers.text: (70-128)% increased Elemental Damage with Melee Weapons

explicitModifiers.text: Melee Weapon Damage Penetrates 1% Elemental Resistances per Mana Burn, up to a maximum of 200%

lines.flavourText:
Life and death dance ever closer,
waiting only for the right moment.

lines.name: Wildfire Phloem

implicitModifiers.text: (25-32)% chance to Ignite with Melee Weapons
(60-114)% increased Damage with Ignite from Melee Weapons

explicitModifiers.text: -1 Fire Damage taken from Hits per Mana Burn
(15-32)% chance to refresh Ignite Duration on Melee Weapon Hit
Cover Full Life Enemies in Ash for (4-12) seconds on Melee Weapon Hit

lines.flavourText: New life will follow, but first come the flames.
